title: annurev-fluid-121021-032828
text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 4]
Here's the breakdown of technical content from the provided page:

**1. Mathematical Equations:**

*   (1/(c²)) (∂²p'/∂t² - ρ * ∇ . (1/ρ * ∇p') ) = ((γ - 1)/c²) (∂q'/∂t)
*   (1/c²) (D²p'/Dt²) - (∂²p'/∂x²) = 0

**2. Graphs/Charts:**
NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**3. Tables:**
NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**4. Diagrams:**
- Figure 1: Combustor Geometry
    - (a) single-can combustors with one or multiple burners
    - (b) can-annular combustors (many interconnected can combustors)
    - (c) annular combustors (annular plenum and combustor)

**5. Key numbers, constants, parameters**
*   M = 0.2 (Mach number)
* 5% (approximate error neglecting mean flow at M=0.2)
*   p' : pressure fluctuation
*   q': heat release rate fluctuation per unit volume
*   γ : ratio of specific heats
*   ρ: density in an undisturbed medium
*   c: speed of sound in an undisturbed medium

text:

Here's a breakdown of the technical content from the provided text and image, as requested:

**1. Mathematical Equations:**

*   NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**2. Graphs/Charts:**

*   **Figure 2:** Visualizations of acoustic pressure mode shapes.
    *   **(a) Purely Longitudinal Mode:** Cylinder with a color gradient representing normalized pressure perturbation that increases along the longitudinal length L (from 0 to 1).
    *   **(b) Purely Circumferential Mode:** Cylinder with a color gradient around the circumferenence representing normalized pressure perturbation (from -1 to 1).
    *   **(c) Mixed Longitudinal-Circumferential Mode:** Cylinder with a color gradient similar to 'b' around the circumference, with a dashed line at the top labeled Lc (mean circumference). Normalized pressure perturbation ranges from -1 to 1.
    *   **(d) Slanted Mode:** Cylinder with a uniform color representing the normalized pressure perturbation which extends diagonally down the cylinder. Delta A_r points to the side of the cylinder. Color Bar values from 0 to 1.
    *   **(e) Push-Pull Mode:** Cylinder with an internal cylinder. Color gradient around the circumferenence representing normalized pressure perturbation (from -1 to 1). L_g is indicated as the length of the annular gap.

**3. Tables:**

*   NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**4. Diagrams:**

*   **Can-Annular Combustor Representation (Figure 2):**
    *   Components: Cylinder representing the combustor.
    *   Labels:
        *   L: Longitudinal length of the combustor
        *   Lc: Mean circumference
        *   Delta A_r: Mean circumference and radial gap width
        *   Lg: Length of the annular gap.

**5. Key Numbers, Constants, Parameters:**

*   The text mentions a can-annular combustor with **12 cans**.
*   Color bars show Normalized pressure perturbation which ranges from -1.0 through 0 to 1.0
    *    The values of L, L_c, delta A_r, L_g are shown on diagrams, but their actual numerical value is not specified in the figure or text.

title: annurev-fluid-121021-032828
text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 9]
Here's the technical content extracted from the provided text:

1.  **Mathematical Equations:**
    *   fa/gd = [T]2x2 * fu/gu (where matrix multiplication is implied)

2.  **Diagrams:**

*   **Figure 3a: Burner transfer matrix approach**
    *   Components: Burner configuration.
    *   Labels:
        *   fu: pressure amplitude of waves moving to the right (upstream)
        *   gu: pressure amplitude of waves moving to the left (upstream)
        *   fa: pressure amplitude of waves moving to the right (downstream)
         *   gd: pressure amplitude of waves moving to the left (downstream)
        *   Flow (direction)

*   **Figure 3b: Flame model approach**
    *   Components: Burner configuration with cylindrical can.
    *   Labels:
        *   u': velocity fluctuation just upstream of the flame
        *   Q': unsteady component of the flame's global heat release rate
        *   Flow (direction)

Table 1 Summary of predictions for thermoacoustic instabilities

| Reference             | Combustor Type    | Method            | Prediction    | Validation |
|-----------------------|--------------------|--------------------|----------------|------------|
| Stow & Dowling 2001   | Ind/annular       | LONM + FTF        | Freq            | Exp        |
| Evesque & Polifke 2002 | Model annular     | LONM + BTM        | Freq            | HS         |
| Schuermans et al. 2003 | Longitudinal/annular | Galerkin (SS) + BTM | Freq       | HS         |
| Stow & Dowling 2004   | Ind/annular       | LONM + FDF        | Freq/type/amp   | Exp        |
| Kopitz et al. 2005    | Lab/annular        | LONM + FTF        | Freq            | Exp        |
| Nicoud et al. 2007    | Ind/annular       | HS + FTF          | Freq/type       | No         |
| Staffelbach et al. 2009| Ind/swirl/annular  | Compressible LES  | Freq/amp       | No         |
| Stow & Dowling 2009   | Ind/annular       | LONM (time domain)| Type            | Exp        |
| Wolf et al. 2012      | Ind/swirl/annular  | Compressible LES  | Freq/amp       | No         |
| Silva et al. 2013     | Lab/ swirl/can        | HS + exp FDF        | Freq/amp       | Exp        |
| Campa & Camporeale 2014 | Ind/annular       | HS + CFD mean flow| Freq           | No         |
| Han et al. 2015      | Lab/bluff-body/can    | LONM + LES FDF    | Freq/amp       | Exp        |
| Mensah et al. 2016    | Ind/annular       | HS + BWT + FTF    | Freq            | HS         |
| Urbano et al. 2016    | Ind/liquid rocket | Compressible LES  | Triggering/freq| Exp        |
| Laera et al. 2017a    | Lab/M-B/annular   | HS + exp FDF        | Freq/amp       | Exp        |
| Laera et al. 2017b    | Lab/M-B/annular   | LONM + exp FDF    | Freq/type/amp   | Exp        |
| Li et al. 2017       | Lab/long flame/can | LONM + LES FDF    | Freq/amp       | Exp        |
| Xia et al. 2019       | Ind/pd/swirl/can   | LONM + LES FDF    | Freq/amp       | Exp        |
